(416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER NOT PRESENT, FATHER PRESENT IN PRO PER, CSA=SAPORITO; SINCE MOTHER IS NOT PRESENT COURT M
AKES AN INTENDED ORDER AS FOLLOWS: COURT ORDERS THAT FATHER LOW INCOME ADJUSTMENT PAY CHILD SUPPORT $175.00 PER MONTH BY WAGE ASSIGNMENT COMMENCING
S THROUGH ON HIS EVALUATION AND SO LONG AS HE SEARCHES FOR EMPLOYMENT; FATHER IS ORDERED TO SEEK AT LEAST FIVE JOBS EVERY TWO WEEKS; SEEK WORK LOGS
TO OBJECT TO ORDER OR IF SHE WISHES TO APPEAR OR IN CASE NEW EVIDENCE COMES TO LIGHT; FATHER REFERRED TO FLF; CONTINUED TO 10/18/01 @ 8:30AM IN ROOM
LEWIS GILLIAN CSR#12355.
